content: mkcert creates locally-trusted dev certs by installing a local CA into system root store. Works for localhost and custom hostnames. No browser warnings. Required for WebTransport in local dev (Chrome requires valid TLS for QUIC/HTTP3). Steps: mkcert -install (one-time), mkcert localhost 127.0.0.1 (generates cert+key). Does not auto-configure servers. Pairing with Caddy or direct wtransport cert loading works well.
